_comment: Copy to config.json and fill in. Credentials live in separate gitignored files (see SKILL.md).

google._note: Place google_token.json (OAuth, Drive+Sheets+Slides scopes) and client_secret.json in this folder.

seller._note: Edit PROMPT_TEMPLATE in personalize.py and deck_template.md.tpl to your company's name + pitch. Default reference identity is 'RevCentric'.
seller.name: RevCentric
